Each hit has a 50% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color> debuff for 1 turn. Has a 50% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Fear]</color> debuff on 2 random enemies for 1 turn if the <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color> debuff is placed.
skill_descriptions.45904:
<color=#1ee600>[Passive Effect]</color>

Damage increases by 40% when this Champion's HP drops below 40%.

<color=#1ee600>[Active Effect]</color>

Revives this Champion with 20% HP when killed. Immediately grants an Extra Turn.
skill_descriptions.46001:
Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 50% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[HP Burn]</color> debuff on the target for 2 turns if this Champion is under an <color=#1ee600>[Increase ATK]</color> buff.

Fills this Champion's Turn Meter by 10% if this attack is critical. Fills this Champion's Turn Meter by 5% if this attack is not critical.
skill_descriptions.46002:
Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 50% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[HP Burn]</color> debuff on the target for 2 turns if this Champion is under an <color=#1ee600>[Increase ATK]</color> buff.

Decreases the target's Turn Meter by 25% if this attack is critical. Decreases the target's Turn Meter by 10% if this attack is not critical.
skill_descriptions.46003: Attacks all enemies 2 times. Each hit has a 50% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[HP Burn]</color> debuff for 2 turns if this Champion is under an <color=#1ee600>[Increase ATK]</color> buff. Each hit also has a 75% chance of decreasing the Turn Meter by 20% if the target is under a <color=#1ee600>[HP Burn]</color> debuff.
skill_descriptions.46004: Fully heals this Champion and instantly removes any <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color> debuffs whenever an enemy places a <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color> debuff on this Champion.
skill_descriptions.46005:
Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 50% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[HP Burn]</color> debuff on the target for 2 turns if this Champion is under an <color=#1ee600>[Increase ATK]</color> buff. Decreases the target's Turn Meter by 25% and places a 50% <color=#1ee600>[Increase ATK]</color> buff on this Champion for 2 turns if this attack is critical.
Decreases the target's Turn Meter by 10% if this attack is not critical.
skill_descriptions.46101: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Increases the inflicted damage by 15% if the target is under a <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buff.
skill_descriptions.46102: Attacks all enemies. Has a 30% chance of placing a 60% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease DEF]</color> debuff on all enemies for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.46103: Places a <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buff on this Champion for 3 turns equal to 20% of their MAX HP. Also places a 60% <color=#1ee600>[Increase DEF]</color> buff on this Champion for 3 turns and fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 50%.
skill_descriptions.46104: Decreases the damage received by this Champion by 15% while under a <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buff.
skill_descriptions.46105: Removes all <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buffs on all enemies, then attacks all enemies. Has a 30% chance of placing a 60% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease DEF]</color> debuff on all enemies for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.46201: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 50% chance of placing a 25% <color=#1ee600>[Weaken]</color> debuff for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.46202: Attacks 1 enemy. Places a 50% <color=#1ee600>[Increase ATK]</color> buff and a 30% <color=#1ee600>[Increase C. RATE]</color> buff on this Champion for 2 turns before attacking if the target has higher MAX HP than this Champion. Will ignore DEF if the target is under a <color=#1ee600>[Weaken]</color> debuff.
skill_descriptions.46203: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Grants an Extra Turn if the target is under <color=#1ee600>[Decrease DEF]</color> and <color=#1ee600>[Weaken]</color> debuffs.
skill_descriptions.46204: Has a 10% chance of granting an Extra Turn whenever this Champion lands a critical hit. Increases damage inflicted on Bosses by 20%.
skill_descriptions.46301:
Attacks all enemies. Has a 15% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color> debuff for 1 turn.

Instantly activates this Skill whenever an enemy under both a <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color> and a <color=#1ee600>[HP Burn]</color> debuff takes damage from the <color=#1ee600>[HP Burn]</color> debuff.
skill_descriptions.46302:
Removes all buffs from a target enemy, then attacks the target 2 times. Steals all buffs instead if the target is under a <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color> debuff.

Will ignore DEF if the target is under both a <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color> and a <color=#1ee600>[HP Burn]</color> debuff.
skill_descriptions.46303:
Attacks all enemies. Places a <color=#1ee600>[Block Buffs]</color> debuff and a 100% <color=#1ee600>[Heal Reduction]</color> debuff for 2 turns on enemies under <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color> debuffs.

Has a 60% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Provoke]</color> debuff for 1 turn on enemies not under <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color> debuffs. 

Decreases the cooldown of 1 random Skill of each ally by 1 turn for every enemy attacked under both a <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color> and a <color=#1ee600>[HP Burn]</color> debuff.
skill_descriptions.46305:
<color=#1ee600>[Passive Effect]</color>

Has a 20% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color> debuff on the enemy each time they receive a buff or have their Turn Meter filled. The 20% chance applies up to twice per enemy turn (once for buffs, once for Turn Meter fills) in cases where an enemy receives multiple of these effects at the same time. 

Does not work with effects from Artifact Sets, Turn Meter filling effects from Masteries, healing, or those buffs or effects that take place at the start of a Round.

<color=#1ee600>[Active Effect]</color>

Revives this Champion to 100% HP when killed and places a <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color> debuff on this Champion for 1 turn.
skill_descriptions.46401: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Places a 15% <color=#1ee600>[Continuous Heal]</color> buff for 1 turn on all allies under <color=#1ee600>[Poison]</color> debuffs.
skill_descriptions.46402: Removes all debuffs except <color=#1ee600>[Poison]</color> debuffs from an ally, then heals them by 30% of their MAX HP and places a <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buff on the target equal to 20% of their MAX HP for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.46403:
Places three 2.5% <color=#1ee600>[Poison]</color> debuffs on all allies for 3 turns. These debuffs cannot be resisted or blocked. 
Also has an 80% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Block Buffs]</color> debuff on all enemies for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.46404:
Allies under <color=#1ee600>[Poison]</color> debuffs inflict 7.5% more damage for each <color=#1ee600>[Poison]</color> debuff on them, stacking up to a maximum of 30%. This damage increase applies to all of their skills.

Also increases each ally's RES by 15 for each <color=#1ee600>[Poison]</color> debuff on them.
skill_descriptions.46502: Heals all allies by 15% of their MAX HP and places a <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buff equal to 15% of their MAX HP on all allies for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.46503:
Places a <color=#1ee600>[Perfect Veil]</color> buff and a 50% <color=#1ee600>[Increase ATK]</color> buff for 2 turns on all allies whose ATK is higher than their DEF. 
 
Places a <color=#1ee600>[Block debuffs]</color> buff for 1 turn and a 60% <color=#1ee600>[Increase DEF]</color> buff for 2 turns and on all allies whose DEF is higher than their ATK.
skill_descriptions.46504: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 30% chance of increasing the duration of a random buff on a random ally by 1 turn.
skill_descriptions.46601: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 20% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Provoke]</color> debuff for 1 turn if the target has higher MAX HP than this Champion.
skill_descriptions.46602: Attacks all enemies. Has a 60% chance of placing a 25% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease ATK]</color> debuff for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.46603: Places a 25% <color=#1ee600>[Ally Protection]</color> buff on all allies for 2 turns. Places a 7.5% <color=#1ee600>[Continuous Heal]</color> buff on this Champion for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.46604: Places a 50% <color=#1ee600>[Ally Protection]</color> buff on all allies for 2 turns. Places a 15% <color=#1ee600>[Continuous Heal]</color> buff on this Champion for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.46702: Places a <color=#1ee600>[Counterattack]</color> and a 25% <color=#1ee600>[Increase ATK]</color> buff on this Champion for 2 turns. Grants an Extra Turn.
skill_descriptions.46703: Has a 20% chance of placing a 30% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease DEF]</color> debuff for 2 turns when attacking targets with higher DEF than this Champion. Has a 20% chance of decreasing the damage taken by 20% when attacked by enemies with higher ATK than this Champion.
skill_descriptions.46704: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Has an additional 30% chance of inflicting a critical hit if the target is under a <color=#1ee600>[Decrease DEF]</color> debuff.
skill_descriptions.46801: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Has an 80% chance of ignoring 15% of the target’s DEF if this Champion has 50% HP or higher. Has a 10% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color> debuff for 1 turn if this Champion has less than 50% HP.
skill_descriptions.46802: Places an <color=#1ee600>[Unkillable]</color> buff on this Champion for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.46803: Has a 5% chance of counterattacking when hit. Has a 25% chance of counterattacking when hit with a critical hit.
skill_descriptions.46902: Places a 25% <color=#1ee600>[Increase ATK]</color> and a 15% <color=#1ee600>[Increase C. RATE]</color> buff on this Champion for 2 turns. Grants an Extra Turn.
skill_descriptions.46903: Attacks all enemies. Has a 50% chance of placing a 30% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease DEF]</color> debuff for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.46904: Attacks all enemies. Has a 50% chance of placing a 60% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease DEF]</color> debuff for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.47001: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit has a 15% chance of placing a 15% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease SPD]</color> debuff for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.47002: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 75% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color> debuff for 1 turn.
skill_descriptions.47003: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a 30% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease DEF]</color> debuff for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.47004: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 75% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color> debuff for 1 turn. Steals 20% of the target’s Turn Meter if the <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color> debuff is not placed.
skill_descriptions.47101:
Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 75% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Fear]</color> debuff for 1 turn. Has a 75% chance of increasing the duration of any <color=#1ee600>[Poison Sensitivity]</color> debuffs by 1 turn.

<color=#1ee600>[Passive Effect]</color>

Attacks enemies with this Skill whenever they place a <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color>, or <color=#1ee600>[Petrification]</color> debuff on an ally. The number of attacks increases according to how many debuffs are placed at that time; 1 attack for each <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color>, or <color=#1ee600>[Petrification]</color> debuff placed. The first attack will target the attacker, while all extra hits will attack random enemies. Can only attack each enemy once.
skill_descriptions.47102: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a 60% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease DEF]</color> debuff and a 25% <color=#1ee600>[Weaken]</color> debuff for 2 turns. Also places a 25% <color=#1ee600>[Strengthen]</color> buff and a 30% <color=#1ee600>[Increase SPD]</color> buff on all allies for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.47103: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. The first hit has a 75% chance of placing a 25% <color=#1ee600>[Poison Sensitivity]</color> debuff for 2 turns. The second hit has a 75% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Block Buffs]</color> and <color=#1ee600>[Block Active Skills]</color> debuff for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.47104:
<color=#1ee600>Denies</color> enemy revive attempts. This works even if this Champion is dead.

If this Champion is alive when an enemy revive is denied, revives all dead allies with 50% HP and 50% Turn Meter. Grants an Extra Turn instead if there are no dead allies.

If this Champion is dead when an enemy revive is denied, revives this Champion with 50% HP and 50% Turn Meter.

This skill will ignore <color=#1ee600>[Block Revive]</color>.
skill_descriptions.47201:
Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 45% chance of placing a 60% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease DEF]</color> debuff for 2 turns. 

The damage of this skill increases by 10% every time this skill is used. Stacks up to 100%.

skill_descriptions.47203: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Has an 80% chance of stealing 100% of the target’s Turn Meter before attacking. This effect cannot be resisted if the target has higher MAX HP than this Champion.

Decreases the damage taken from AoE attacks by 50%. 

If a target’s MAX HP is more than double this Champion's MAX HP, this Champion’s attacks will deal damage based on the target's MAX HP, instead of this Champion's ATK.

skill_descriptions.47302: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 75% chance of placing a 30% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease DEF]</color> debuff for 2 turns. Has a 75% chance of placing a 60% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease DEF]</color> debuff instead if the target is under a <color=#1ee600>[Poison]</color> debuff.
skill_descriptions.47303: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times.Each hit places a 2.5% <color=#1ee600>[Poison]</color> debuff for 2 turns. Places a 5% <color=#1ee600>[Poison]</color> debuff instead if the target is under a <color=#1ee600>[Poison Sensitivity]</color> debuff.
skill_descriptions.47401: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 35% chance of increasing the cooldown of one of the target's Skills by 1 turn at random.
skill_descriptions.47402: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit has a 75% chance of decreasing the Turn Meter by 5%. Decreases the Turn Meter by 10% instead if the target is under a <color=#1ee600>[Decrease ATK]</color> debuff.
skill_descriptions.47403: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a 50% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease ATK]</color> debuff for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.47404: Each hit has a 50% chance of decreasing the target's Turn Meter by 7.5%. Each hit also has a 50% chance of putting one of the target's Skills on cooldown if the target is under a <color=#1ee600>[Decrease C. RATE]</color> debuff.
skill_descriptions.47501: Attacks 1 enemy. Has an 80% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Sleep]</color> debuff for 1 turn if the target’s Turn Meter is equal to or above 50%. Heals all allies by 5% of their MAX HP if the target’s Turn Meter is below 50%.
skill_descriptions.47502: Places a <color=#1ee600>[Block Debuffs]</color> buff on all allies for 2 turns, then fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 10% and places a 60% <color=#1ee600>[Increase DEF]</color> buff and a 30% <color=#1ee600>[Increase SPD]</color> buff on all allies for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.47503: Revives a single ally with 55% HP and a full Turn Meter. Places a 50% <color=#1ee600>[Increase ATK]</color> buff and a 30% <color=#1ee600>[Increase C. RATE]</color> buff on that ally for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.47504:
Heals each ally by 10% of their MAX HP at the start of their turn. 

Has a 40% chance of removing any <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Fear]</color> and <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color> debuffs from each ally at the start of their turn. Removes all debuffs from <color=#F3BC02>Rotos the Lost Groom</color> at the start of their turn if they are on the same team.
skill_descriptions.47505: Attacks 1 enemy. Has an 80% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Sleep]</color> debuff for 1 turn if the target’s Turn Meter is equal to or above 50%. This debuff cannot be resisted. Heals all allies by 5% of their MAX HP if the target’s Turn Meter is below 50%.

skill_descriptions.47602:
Attacks 1 enemy. Destroys the target's MAX HP by 20%, then adds that HP to this Champion's own MAX HP.

[Cannot destroy a single Champion's MAX HP by more than 60% in one Battle. Cannot increase this Champion's MAX HP by more than 60,000. Destroys the MAX HP of Bosses by 30% of the damage inflicted instead. This Champion's MAX HP will be increased by 15,000 when this Skill is used against Bosses.]
skill_descriptions.47603: Attacks 1 enemy. Will ignore 60% of the target's DEF. Will also ignore <color=#1ee600>[Unkillable]</color> and <color=#1ee600>[Block Damage]</color> buffs.
skill_descriptions.47604:
Will decrease damage from enemy hits so that incoming damage from any single hit will not exceed 50% of this Сhampion's MAX HP. Grants an Extra Turn if this damage reduction occurs. 

[Does not work against Bosses.] 

Decreases the damage taken from Bosses by 15%. Decreases the damage taken from Bosses by 30% if <color=#F3BC02>Siphi the Lost Bride</color> is on the same team.
skill_descriptions.47605: Attacks 1 enemy. Will ignore 60% of the target's DEF. Will also ignore <color=#1ee600>[Unkillable]</color> and <color=#1ee600>[Block Damage]</color> buffs. Enemies killed by this skill cannot be revived if this Champion has gained maximum amount of HP from the <color=#1ee600>Vitality Plunder</color> skill. Grants an Extra Turn if this skill kills an enemy.

Attacks all enemies. Has a 50% chance of decreasing each target's Turn Meter by 10%.

If <color=#F3BC02>Minaya</color> is on the same team, attacks all enemies 2 times and the chance to decrease each target's Turn Meter becomes 100% instead. The damage of each hit will be decreased by 50%.
skill_descriptions.47702: Has a 75% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Provoke]</color> debuff on all enemies for 1 turn.
skill_descriptions.47703:
Attacks all enemies. Places a 50% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease ATK]</color> debuff and a 60% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease DEF]</color> debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. 

If <color=#F3BC02>Minaya</color> is on the team, these debuffs cannot be resisted.
skill_descriptions.47704:
Counterattacks when hit by enemies under <color=#1ee600>[Decrease ATK]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Decrease DEF]</color>, or <color=#1ee600>[Decrease SPD]</color> debuffs. 

Always counterattacks when hit if <color=#F3BC02>Minaya</color> is on the same team.
skill_descriptions.47705: Places a 60% <color=#1ee600>[Increase DEF]</color> buff on all allies for 2 turns if this Champion kills an enemy.
skill_descriptions.47706:
Has a 75% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Provoke]</color> debuff on all enemies for 1 turn. Also places a <color=#1ee600>[Block Debuffs]</color> buff and a 60% <color=#1ee600>[Increase DEF]</color> buff on this Champion for 2 turns.

If <color=#F3BC02>Minaya</color> is on the same team, the <color=#1ee600>[Provoke]</color> debuff placed by this Champion cannot be resisted.

If <color=#F3BC02>Minaya</color> is on the same team, also removes all debuffs from all allies and then places a <color=#1ee600>[Block Debuffs]</color> buff and <color=#1ee600>[Increase DEF]</color> buff on all allies for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.47801: Attacks 1 enemy. Places a 15% <color=#1ee600>[Continuous Heal]</color> buff on the ally with the lowest HP for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.47802:
Attacks 1 enemy. Heals this Champion and the ally with the lowest HP by 30% of this Champion's MAX HP. Has a 75% chance of placing a 100% <color=#1ee600>[Heal Reduction]</color> debuff and a <color=#1ee600>[Leech]</color> debuff on all enemies for 2 turns.

These debuffs cannot be resisted if <color=#F3BC02>Khoronar</color> is on the same team.
skill_descriptions.47803:
Heals all allies by 40% of their MAX HP. Places a <color=#1ee600>[Block Debuffs]</color> buff on all allies for 2 turns.

If a Champion is fully healed by this skill, also places a <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buff on them for 2 turns equal to 25% of the Champion's HP.
skill_descriptions.47804:
Fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 20% and heals them by 20% of this Champion's MAX HP when this Champion is killed. 

Revives this Champion with 75% HP when killed if <color=#F3BC02>Khoronar</color> is on the same team.
skill_descriptions.47901: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 20% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color> debuff for 1 turn.
skill_descriptions.47902: Places a 50% <color=#1ee600>[Increase ATK]</color> buff and a 60% <color=#1ee600>[Increase DEF]</color> buff on all allies for 2 turns. Also places a <color=#1ee600>[Block Damage]</color> buff for 1 turn on allies with less than 30% HP.

<color=#1ee600>[Active Effect]</color>

Places a <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buff equal to 15% of this Champion's MAX HP on all allies for 3 turns. 

<color=#1ee600>[Passive Effect]</color>

Heals each ally by 15% of this Champion's MAX HP whenever a <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buff placed by this Skill expires, is removed, or is broken by an enemy attack. When a <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> is broken, the heal occurs instantly before any remaining damage from the Shield-breaking attack is taken.
skill_descriptions.47904:
<color=#1ee600>[Active Effect]</color>

Places a <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buff equal to 15% of this Champion's MAX HP on all allies for 3 turns. 

<color=#1ee600>[Passive Effect]</color>

Heals each ally by 15% of this Champion's MAX HP whenever a <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buff placed by this Skill expires, is removed, or is broken by an enemy attack. Allies whose <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buffs are broken will also counterattack the enemy that breaks the <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color>. When a <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> is broken, the heal occurs instantly before any remaining damage from the Shield-breaking attack is taken.

Grants an Extra Turn if no enemies are killed during this attack.

Places a <color=#1ee600>[Block Debuffs]</color> buff, a 50% <color=#1ee600>[Ally Protection]</color> buff, and a 25% <color=#1ee600>[Strengthen]</color> buff on an ally for 3 turns.

The <color=#1ee600>[Ally Protection]</color> buff cannot be removed.

Whenever an ally is attacked while under an <color=#1ee600>[Ally Protection]</color> buff placed by this Champion, places a <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buff on the ally equal to 30% of this Champion's MAX HP for 2 turns. Occurs only if the ally does not already have a <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buff placed by this Champion.

Also decreases the cooldown of this Champion's <color=#1ee600>Legion of the Damned</color> skill by 2 turns if the <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buff is placed.

Places a <color=#1ee600>[Block Debuffs]</color> buff and a 25% <color=#1ee600>[Strengthen]</color> buff for 3 turns on the ally with the lowest MAX HP at the start of each Round. Also places a 50% <color=#1ee600>[Ally Protection]</color> buff on them for 6 turns. 

The <color=#1ee600>[Ally Protection]</color> buff cannot be removed.

Whenever an ally under a <color=#1ee600>[Veil]</color> or <color=#1ee600>[Perfect Veil]</color> buff gets a turn, heals them by 10% of their MAX HP. Also increases the RES of allies under <color=#1ee600>[Veil]</color> or <color=#1ee600>[Perfect Veil]</color> buffs by 50.

skill_descriptions.51403: Attacks all enemies, then attacks the enemy with the lowest HP. Has a 75% chance of placing a 50% <color=#1ee600>[Heal Reduction]</color> debuff on the enemy with the lowest HP for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.51404: Attacks all enemies, then attacks the enemy with the lowest HP. Has a 75% chance of placing a 100% <color=#1ee600>[Heal Reduction]</color> debuff on the enemy with the lowest HP for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.51501: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 25% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Block Active Skills]</color> debuff for 1 turn.
skill_descriptions.51502: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 40% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color> debuff for 1 turn if the target is under any debuff.
skill_descriptions.51503: Places a 15% <color=#1ee600>[Continuous Heal]</color> buff on all allies for 2 turns. Also places a <color=#1ee600>[Block Debuffs]</color> buff on the target ally for 1 turn if they have less than 100% HP.
skill_descriptions.51601: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit has a 30% chance of placing a 25% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease ATK]</color> debuff for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.51602: Attacks 1 enemy 3 times. Each hit places a 100% <color=#1ee600>[Heal Reduction]</color> debuff for 2 turns if this Champion has full HP. Each hit places a 50% <color=#1ee600>[Heal Reduction]</color> debuff for 2 turns if this Champion has less than 100% HP.
skill_descriptions.51603: Decreases the cooldown of the <color=#1ee600>Rip to Shreds</color> skill every time this Champion’s HP drops below 50%.
skill_descriptions.51604: Places a 25% <color=#1ee600>[Increase ATK]</color> buff on this Champion for 1 turn and decreases the cooldown of the <color=#1ee600>Rip to Shreds</color> skill every time this Champion’s HP drops below 50%.
skill_descriptions.51701: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 35% chance of placing a 50% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease ACC]</color> debuff for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.51702: Attacks 1 enemy. Places a 7.5% <color=#1ee600>[Continuous Heal]</color> buff on the ally with the lowest HP for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.51703: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 75% chance of placing a 30% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease DEF]</color> debuff for 2 turns. Also has a 75% chance of decreasing the target's Turn Meter by 15%.
skill_descriptions.51704: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 75% chance of placing a 60% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease DEF]</color> debuff for 2 turns. Also has a 75% chance of decreasing the target's Turn Meter by 15%.
skill_descriptions.51801: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 20% chance of placing a 15% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease SPD]</color> debuff for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.51802: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 35% chance of decreasing the target's Turn Meter by 20%.
skill_descriptions.51803: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 75% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[HP Burn]</color> debuff for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.51901: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 30% chance of removing one random buff from the target.
skill_descriptions.51902: Attacks 1 enemy. Places a <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buff on this Champion equal to 20% of the damage inflicted for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.51903: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 75% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color> debuff for 1 turn.
skill_descriptions.52001: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 15% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color> debuff for 1 turn. The chance of placing the <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color> debuff increases by 5% for each debuff on the target.

skill_descriptions.52003: Heals this Champion by 15% of their MAX HP every time this Champion or an ally kills an enemy.
skill_descriptions.52101: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Will ignore <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buffs.
skill_descriptions.52102: Attacks all enemies. Inflicts 10% extra C. DMG for each debuff on this Champion. Stacks up to 50%.
skill_descriptions.52103: Attacks 1 enemy. Destroys the target’s MAX HP by 20% of the damage inflicted.
skill_descriptions.52201: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit has a 10% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Fear]</color> debuff for 1 turn.
skill_descriptions.52202: Attacks all enemies. Has a 30% chance of placing a 100% <color=#1ee600>[Heal Reduction]</color> debuff for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.52203: Inflicts 15% more damage to targets under <color=#1ee600>[Heal Reduction]</color> debuffs.
skill_descriptions.52302: Removes one random debuff from this Champion, then attacks 1 enemy. Heals this Champion by 25% of the damage inflicted.
skill_descriptions.52303: Attacks 1 enemy. Places a 15% <color=#1ee600>[Increase SPD]</color> buff on all allies for 2 turns if this attack kills an enemy.

skill_descriptions.52402: Attacks 1 enemy. Places a 15% <color=#1ee600>[Increase C. DMG]</color> buff on all allies for 2 turns if this attack is critical.
skill_descriptions.52403: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 75% chance of removing 2 random buffs from the target.
skill_descriptions.52501: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 30% chance of placing a 5% <color=#1ee600>[Poison]</color> debuff for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.52502: Attacks all enemies. Has a 50% chance of placing a 25% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease ATK]</color> debuff for 2 turns. Also places a 15% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease SPD]</color> debuff for 1 turn on targets under <color=#1ee600>[Poison]</color> debuffs.
skill_descriptions.52503: Fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 15% and heals all allies by 15% of this Champion’s MAX HP.
skill_descriptions.52601: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 15% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color> debuff for 1 turn.
skill_descriptions.52602: Attacks all enemies, then places a 30% <color=#1ee600>[Increase DEF]</color> buff on this Champion for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.52603: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 70% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Provoke]</color> debuff for 1 turn.
skill_descriptions.52604: Attacks all enemies, then places a 30% <color=#1ee600>[Increase DEF]</color> buff on all allies for 2 turns.

skill_descriptions.52702: Places a <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buff on all allies equal to 15% of this Champion's MAX HP for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.52703: Attacks 1 enemy. Removes all debuffs from the ally with the lowest HP, then heals them by 25% of the damage inflicted.

skill_descriptions.52802: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a 30% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease SPD]</color> debuff for 2 turns. Also places a 30% <color=#1ee600>[Increase SPD]</color> buff on this Champion for 2 turns. Heals this Champion by 15% of the damage inflicted if they have less than 50% HP when attacking.

skill_descriptions.52804: Decreases the damage taken by this Champion by 20% when their HP drops below 60%.

skill_descriptions.52902: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a 50% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease ATK]</color> debuff for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.52904: Revives 2 random allies with 50% HP and places a 60% <color=#1ee600>[Increase DEF]</color> buff on them for 1 turn.
skill_descriptions.53001: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit has a 35% chance of stealing 5% of the target’s current Turn Meter.
skill_descriptions.53002: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 75% chance of placing two 5% <color=#1ee600>[Poison]</color> debuffs for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.53003: Attacks 1 enemy 3 times. The first hit has a 75% chance of placing a 60% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease DEF]</color> debuff for 3 turns. The second hit has a 75% chance of placing a 25% <color=#1ee600>[Weaken]</color> debuff for 3 turns. The third hit heals this Champion by 4% of their MAX HP for every debuff on the target.
skill_descriptions.53004: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 75% chance of placing two 5% <color=#1ee600>[Poison]</color> debuffs and a 50% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease ATK]</color> debuff for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.53101: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. The first hit has a 20% chance of filling this Champion’s Turn Meter by 10%. The second hit has a 20% chance of decreasing the target’s Turn Meter by 10%.
skill_descriptions.53102: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. The first hit places a <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> equal to 25% of the damage inflicted on all allies for 2 turns. The second hit heals all allies by 10% of the damage inflicted.
skill_descriptions.53103: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. The first hit has a 75% chance of placing a 50% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease ATK]</color> debuff for 2 turns. The second hit has a 75% chance of placing a 60% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease DEF]</color> debuff for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.53104:
Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. The first hit has a 75% chance of placing a 50% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease ATK]</color> debuff for 2 turns and a 75% chance of removing any <color=#1ee600>[Increase ATK]</color> buffs from the target.

The second hit has a 75% chance of placing a 60% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease DEF]</color> debuff for 2 turns and a 75% chance of removing any <color=#1ee600>[Increase DEF]</color> buffs from the target.

Also has a 75% chance of placing a 100% <color=#1ee600>[Heal Reduction]</color> debuff and a 60% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease DEF]</color> debuff for 2 turns.

skill_descriptions.53301: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 45% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Block Active Skills]</color> debuff for 1 turn.
skill_descriptions.53302: Attacks all enemies. Places a 25% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease C. DMG]</color> debuff and a 50% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease ATK]</color> debuff for 2 turns on targets whose ATK is higher than their DEF. Places a 30% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease SPD]</color> debuff and a 60% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease DEF]</color> debuff for 2 turns on targets whose ATK is equal to or lower than their DEF.
skill_descriptions.53303: Places a 50% <color=#1ee600>[Ally Protection]</color> buff on all allies except this Champion for 3 turns. Places a 25% <color=#1ee600>[Strengthen]</color> buff on this Champion for 3 turns.
skill_descriptions.53304: Decreases the damage all allies receive from critical hits by 30%. This Champion will receive that damage instead.

Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Before attacking, places a 50% <color=#1ee600>[Increase ATK]</color> buff on this Champion for 2 turns. Will ignore 25% of the target's DEF. 

Also places a <color=#1ee600>[Perfect Veil]</color> buff on this Champion for 2 turns.

Then, fills this Champion's Turn Meter by 30%.

Attacks 1 enemy. Will ignore 25% of the target's DEF. Destroys the target's MAX HP by 25% of the damage inflicted.

Will repeat the attack if the target has both higher DEF and higher MAX HP than this Champion.

Places a <color=#1ee600>[Revive On Death]</color> buff on this Champion for 2 turns if this attack kills an enemy.
skill_descriptions.53404: When revived, attacks the enemy that killed this Champion with the default Skill. Also fills this Champion's Turn Meter by 25% and places a <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buff on this Champion equal to 50% of their MAX HP for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.53405:
Each hit has a 50% chance of decreasing the target's Turn Meter by 10% and a 100% chance of destroying the target's MAX HP by 10% of the damage inflicted when attacking enemies under <color=#1ee600>[Heal Reduction]</color> or <color=#1ee600>[Decrease DEF]</color> debuffs.

Also heals this Champion by 10% of the damage inflicted when attacking enemies under <color=#1ee600>[Heal Reduction]</color> or <color=#1ee600>[Decrease DEF]</color> debuffs.

[Will not heal from damage inflicted by Masteries.]
skill_descriptions.53501: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 50% chance of increasing the duration of all debuffs on the target by 1 turn.
skill_descriptions.53502:
Attacks 1 enemy. 

Has a 75% chance of placing a 50% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease ATK]</color> debuff for 3 turns. Also has a 75% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Leech]</color> debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. Then instantly activates all <color=#1ee600>[Poison]</color> debuffs on all enemies.

Heals all allies by 25% of this Champion's MAX HP.
skill_descriptions.53503:
Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 75% chance of placing three 5% <color=#1ee600>[Poison]</color> debuffs and a 25% <color=#1ee600>[Poison Sensitivity]</color> debuff for 3 turns.

If the initial target is already under 3 or more debuffs, places three 5% <color=#1ee600>[Poison]</color> debuffs and a 25% <color=#1ee600>[Poison Sensitivity]</color> debuff on all enemies for 3 turns instead.

Whenever an ally is attacked, has a 25% chance of placing a 5% <color=#1ee600>[Poison]</color> debuff on the attacker for 2 turns. Whenever this Champion is attacked, the chance increases to 50%.

Enemies under <color=#1ee600>[Poison]</color> debuffs inflict 5% less damage per each <color=#1ee600>[Poison]</color> debuff on them (stacks up to 25%). If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate.

Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit decreases the target's Turn Meter by 7.5% if the target is under a <color=#1ee600>[Fear]</color> or a <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color> debuff. 

Reduces the cooldown of this Champion's <color=#1ee600>Taste of Despair [P]</color> skill by 1 turn if this attack kills an enemy.

skill_descriptions.53604: Fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 50% whenever an enemy’s HP drops below 20%.

skill_descriptions.53702:

Also has a 75% chance of decreasing all enemies' Turn Meters by 20%. Decreases each enemy's Turn Meter by an additional 10% for each buff removed.

Prevents this Champion's death and keeps them alive on 1 HP when hit by a fatal hit.

If this skill prevents this Champion's death, heals them by 30% of their MAX HP, fills their Turn Meter by 30%, and places a <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buff on them equal to 30% of their MAX HP for 2 turns.

Will not prevent this Champion's death if they are under a <color=#1ee600>[Heal Reduction]</color> debuff.

Cannot remove a debuff from this Champion.

Inflicts damage based on this Champion’s MAX HP when attacking Bosses.

This attack cannot be critical.
skill_descriptions.63704: Decreases the values of all enemy <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buffs by 50% at the start of every turn, then increases this Champion’s MAX HP by the same amount (up to 25% of their MAX HP).
skill_descriptions.63802: Removes all debuffs from an ally, then heals them by 40% of their MAX HP.
skill_descriptions.63803: Places two 5% <color=#1ee600>[Poison]</color> debuffs on all enemies for 2 turns. Also places a 15% <color=#1ee600>[Continuous Heal]</color> buff on all allies for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.63804: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit has a 25% chance of placing a 5% <color=#1ee600>[Poison]</color> debuff for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.63901: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 40% chance of removing 1 random buff. Has a 50% chance of stealing 1 random buff instead if the target has 3 or more buffs.
skill_descriptions.63902: Attacks all enemies. Has a 50% chance of placing a 15% <color=#1ee600>[Weaken]</color> debuff for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.63903: Places a 25% <color=#1ee600>[Increase ATK]</color> buff and a 15% <color=#1ee600>[Increase C. RATE]</color> buff on this Champion for 3 turns, then attacks all enemies.
skill_descriptions.64002: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 65% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color> debuff for 1 turn. Decreases the Turn Meters of all enemies by 10% if this attack is critical.
skill_descriptions.64003: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a 15% <color=#1ee600>[Weaken]</color> debuff for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.64004: Attacks 1 enemy. Resets the cooldown of the <color=#1ee600>Devastator</color> skill if this attack kills an enemy.
skill_descriptions.64101: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit has a 20% chance of placing a 60% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease DEF]</color> debuff for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.64102: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 50% chance of stealing all buffs from the target before attacking.
skill_descriptions.64103: Swaps HP with an enemy, then grants an Extra Turn.
skill_descriptions.64201: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 30% chance of placing a 25% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease ATK]</color> debuff for 2 turns. Also has a 20% chance of increasing the duration of any <color=#1ee600>[Decrease DEF]</color> debuffs by 1 turn.
skill_descriptions.64202: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 50% chance of placing a 60% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease DEF]</color> debuff for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.64203: Places a 15% <color=#1ee600>[Increase C. DMG]</color> buff on this Champion for 2 turns, then attacks all enemies.
skill_descriptions.64301: Attacks 1 enemy. Will place 3 hits if the target is under 3 or more debuffs. Each hit has a 40% chance of placing a 25% <color=#1ee600>[Weaken]</color> debuff for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.64302:
Attacks all enemies. Has an 80% chance of placing a 50% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease ATK]</color> debuff for 2 turns. 
 
After attacking, has an 80% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[HP Burn]</color> debuff for 2 turns on all enemies that this skill did not place a <color=#1ee600>[Decrease ATK]</color> debuff on.
skill_descriptions.64303: Places a 50% <color=#1ee600>[Ally Protection]</color> buff on all allies except this Champion for 2 turns. Also places a <color=#1ee600>[Block Damage]</color> buff on this Champion for 3 turns, then grants an Extra Turn.
skill_descriptions.64304: Every time this Champion is hit with a critical hit, heals all allies by 15% of their MAX HP, then places a 60% <color=#1ee600>[Increase DEF]</color> buff on all allies for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.64401: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit has a 30% chance of placing a 60% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease DEF]</color> debuff for 2 turns. The chance increases to 50% if the target is under a <color=#1ee600>[Fear]</color> or <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color> debuff.
skill_descriptions.64402: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a 50% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease ACC]</color> debuff for 2 turns and a <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color> debuff for 1 turn. Champions from the High Elf and Dark Elf Factions cannot resist these debuffs.
skill_descriptions.64403:
Attacks 1 enemy. Will ignore <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buffs. 

Decreases the cooldown of the <color=#1ee600>Battle Flow</color> skill by 2 turns, fills this Champion's Turn Meter by 30%, and places a 30% <color=#1ee600>[Increase C. DMG]</color> buff on this Champion for 2 turns if this attack kills an enemy.
skill_descriptions.64404:
Heals this Champion by 50% of their MAX HP every time this Champion kills an enemy. 

Also grants an Extra Turn every time this Champions kills an enemy from the High Elf or Dark Elf Factions.
skill_descriptions.64501: Attacks 1 enemy. Transfers 1 random debuff from this Champion to the target. Also has a 75% chance of stealing 1 random buff from the target.
skill_descriptions.64502:
Places a 50% <color=#1ee600>[Increase ACC]</color> buff on all allies for 2 turns, then attacks all enemies. Places a 100% <color=#1ee600>[Heal Reduction]</color> debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. Also has a 75% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Block Buffs]</color> debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. 

Champions from the Demonspawn, Undead Horde, and Knights Revenant Factions cannot resist these debuffs.

skill_descriptions.64504: Removes all <color=#1ee600>[Decrease DEF]</color> debuffs and <color=#1ee600>[Weaken]</color> debuffs from this Champion at the start of each turn.
skill_descriptions.64601: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit has a 40% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color> debuff for 1 turn. Each hit will fill this Champion’s Turn Meter by 15% if the target is not under a <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color> debuff after the hit.
skill_descriptions.64602: Attacks 1 enemy. Has an 80% chance of decreasing the target's Turn Meter by 75%. If this skill fully depletes the target's Turn Meter, also has an 80% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color> debuff on all other enemies for 1 turn.
skill_descriptions.64603: Attacks 1 enemy. Will ignore 50% of the target’s DEF.

Immune to <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color> debuffs. 

Deals 15% more damage to Bosses and receives 15% less damage from them.

Attacks 1 enemy. Will ignore 50% of the target’s DEF. 

<color=#1ee600>[Passive Effect]</color>

Will always use this Skill instead of the default Skill when counterattacking.

This Skill will not be blocked by <color=#1ee600>[Block Active Skills]</color> debuffs.

Also increases the duration of all <color=#1ee600>[Continuous Heal]</color> buffs on all allies by 1 turn, then instantly activates any <color=#1ee600>[Continuous Heal]</color> buffs on all allies.
skill_descriptions.64703: Removes all debuffs from all allies, then heals all allies by 30% of this Champion’s MAX HP.

If this Champion is under an <color=#1ee600>[Increase ATK]</color> buff, steals all buffs from the target enemy before attacking.

skill_descriptions.66203: Places a <color=#1ee600>[Counterattack]</color> buff and a 25% <color=#1ee600>[Increase ATK]</color> buff on this Champion for 2 turns.

Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Leech]</color> debuff for 2 turns.

Also has a 75% chance of stealing 50% of the Turn Meter from Champions from the Banner Lord, Sacred Order, or High Elf Factions. Has a 75% chance of decreasing the Turn Meter by 50% instead against targets not from those Factions.

Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a 60% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease DEF]</color> debuff and a <color=#1ee600>[Block Active Skills]</color> debuff for 2 turns.

Places a <color=#1ee600>[Perfect Veil]</color> buff on this Champion for 2 turns.

Places a <color=#1ee600>[Revive On Death]</color> buff on this Champion for 2 turns every time this Champion kills an enemy. 

Also fully heals this Champion and fills their Turn Meter by 50% every time they kill an enemy. 

[Will only heal and fill this Champion’s Turn Meter when <color=#F3BC02>Konstantin the Dayborn</color> is on the same team.]

Attacks 1 enemy. 

Places a 60% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease DEF]</color> debuff for 2 turns. This debuff cannot be resisted when <color=#F3BC02>Vlad the Nightborn</color> is on the same team.

Places an extra hit if the target is under any debuff.

Attacks all enemies 2 times. Each hit will ignore 15% of each target's DEF.

Each hit will ignore an additional 10% of each target's DEF for every <color=#1ee600>[Leech]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Decrease DEF]</color>, and <color=#1ee600>[Block Active Skills]</color> debuff they are under.

Resets the cooldown of this skill if the target is killed.
skill_descriptions.66704:
Enemies from the Undead Horde, Demonspawn, and Knights Revenant Factions killed by this Champion cannot be revived. 

[All enemies killed by this Champion cannot be revived when <color=#F3BC02>Vlad the Nightborn</color> is on the same team.]

After stealing, applies a <color=#1ee600>[Buff Spread]</color> effect, taking all buffs from this Champion and placing them on all allies.

Can target dead or living enemies. 
 
If the target is dead, places <color=#1ee600>[Block Revive]</color> on them, then attacks all enemies. Each enemy will receive damage equal to 20% of the target enemy's MAX HP. If the target is a Boss' minion, the damage is equal to 20% of this Champion's MAX HP. This attack cannot be critical, and will ignore any <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buffs and 100% of each target's DEF.
 
If the target is alive, places a <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color> debuff on them for 2 turns and heals all allies by 20% of the target enemy's MAX HP. If the target is a Boss or a Boss' minion, the healing is equal to 20% of this Champion's MAX HP. The <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color> debuff cannot be resisted.

Revives 1 random ally with 30% HP and 30% Turn Meter each time an enemy is killed. 

Revives 1 random ally with 30% HP and 30% Turn Meter each time a <color=#1ee600>[Block Revive]</color> debuff is placed on an enemy.

Will ignore any <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buffs.

skill_descriptions.67304: Enemies under <color=#1ee600>[Block Active Skills]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Block Buffs]</color>, and <color=#1ee600>[Heal Reduction]</color> debuffs cannot decrease this Champion’s Turn Meter.
skill_descriptions.67401: Attacks 2 times at random. Each hit has an 80% chance of placing a 5% <color=#1ee600>[Poison]</color> debuff for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.67402: Attacks all enemies. Places a <color=#1ee600>[Hex]</color> debuff for 2 turns. Also places a 60% <color=#1ee600>[Increase DEF]</color> buff and a 50% <color=#1ee600>[Increase ATK]</color> buff on all allies for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.67403: Removes all debuffs from all allies, then places a 25% <color=#1ee600>[Strengthen]</color> buff and a <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buff equal to 30% of this Champion’s MAX HP on all allies for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.67404:
Whenever this Champion is attacked by an enemy under a <color=#1ee600>[Hex]</color> debuff, has a 50% chance of applying a <color=#1ee600>[Petrification]</color> debuff on the attacker for 1 turn. 

Whenever an ally is attacked by an enemy under a <color=#1ee600>[Hex]</color> debuff, has a 30% chance of applying a <color=#1ee600>[Petrification]</color> debuff on the attacker for 1 turn. 

Also increases this Champion’s RES. The amount by which it is increased is equal to the amount of ACC this Champion has.
skill_descriptions.67501: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 50% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color> debuff for 1 turn. Also applies a <color=#1ee600>[Debuff Spread]</color> effect, taking all debuffs from the target and placing them on all enemies under <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color> debuffs.
skill_descriptions.67502:
Attacks all enemies. Steals all buffs from all enemies. 

Places a 25% <color=#1ee600>[Weaken]</color> debuff for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.67503:
Places a <color=#1ee600>[Block Debuffs]</color> buff on all allies for 2 turns. 

Has a 75% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color> debuff on all enemies for 1 turn. 

Fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 15%. Fills the Turn Meters of each ally by an extra 5% for each <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color> debuff placed by this skill.
skill_descriptions.67504:
This Champion's skills cannot be put on cooldown. 

Whenever an enemy tries to put either this Champion's skills or an ally's skills on cooldown, places a <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color> debuff on that enemy. The <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color> debuff cannot be blocked or resisted. 

Also has a 50% chance of denying the cooldown increase effect. That chance increases by 25% for each enemy under a <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color> debuff. Will not deny cooldown increasing effects from Bosses.

Whenever an enemy tries to put either this Champion's skills or an ally's skills on cooldown, activates an <color=#1ee600>[Instant Turn]</color> effect on this Champion. Occurs once per turn.
skill_descriptions.67601: Attacks 1 enemy. Has an 80% chance of placing a 50% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease ACC]</color> debuff for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.67602: Places a <color=#1ee600>[Block Debuffs]</color> buff and a 60% <color=#1ee600>[Increase DEF]</color> buff on all allies for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.67603: Attacks all enemies. Places a <color=#1ee600>[Perfect Veil]</color> buff on all allies except this Champion for 2 turns. Also places a <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buff on this Champion for 2 turns equal to 20% of the damage inflicted.
skill_descriptions.67604: When attacked, reflects 30% of the damage this Champion receives back to the attacker. Also has a 30% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color> debuff on the attacker for 1 turn.
skill_descriptions.67701: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 50% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Sleep]</color> debuff for 1 turn.
skill_descriptions.67702: Attacks all enemies 2 times. The first hit has a 75% chance of placing a 5% <color=#1ee600>[Poison]</color> debuff for 4 turns. The second hit has a 75% chance of placing a 60% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease DEF]</color> debuff for 3 turns.
skill_descriptions.67703:
Attacks 1 enemy, then attacks 1 time at random. If the target is under a <color=#1ee600>[Poison]</color> debuff, will ignore <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Block Damage]</color>, and <color=#1ee600>[Unkillable]</color> buffs. 

Grants an Extra Turn if this attack kills an enemy. Also resets the cooldown of the <color=#1ee600>Venom Storm</color> skill if this attack kills 2 enemies.
skill_descriptions.67704:
Instantly attacks enemies with the default skill whenever they receive damage from <color=#1ee600>[Poison]</color> debuffs placed by this Champion. 

When hitting enemies under <color=#1ee600>[Poison]</color> debuffs, heals this Champion by 10% of the damage inflicted.
skill_descriptions.67801: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Has an additional 20% chance of inflicting a critical hit if this Champion is under a <color=#1ee600>[Veil]</color> or <color=#1ee600>[Perfect Veil]</color> buff.
skill_descriptions.67802: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit will ignore 20% of the target's DEF. Has an additional 20% chance of inflicting a critical hit if this Champion is under a <color=#1ee600>[Veil]</color> or <color=#1ee600>[Perfect Veil]</color> buff.
skill_descriptions.67803: Places a <color=#1ee600>[Perfect Veil]</color> buff and a 30% <color=#1ee600>[Increase SPD]</color> buff on this Champion for 2 turns, then fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 40%.
skill_descriptions.67804:
Whenever this Champion is attacked, completely blocks 1 hit, decreasing the incoming damage to zero, then counterattacks with the default skill.

When attacked by a Boss, decreases the incoming damage by 50% instead before counterattacking.

skill_descriptions.67902: Attacks all enemies. Has a 50% chance of placing a 50% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease ATK]</color> debuff for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.67903: Places a 60% <color=#1ee600>[Increase DEF]</color> buff on all allies for 2 turns. Also fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 15%.
skill_descriptions.68001: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 30% chance of decreasing the target’s Turn Meter by 15%. This chance increases to 100% if the target is under a <color=#1ee600>[Decrease C. RATE]</color> debuff or a <color=#1ee600>[Decrease C. DMG]</color> debuff.
skill_descriptions.68002: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a 30% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease C. RATE]</color> debuff and a 25% <color=#1ee600>[Decrease C. DMG]</color> debuff on all enemies for 2 turns.
skill_descriptions.68003: Places a 30% <color=#1ee600>[Increase C. RATE]</color> buff and a 30% <color=#1ee600>[Increase C. DMG]</color> buff on all allies for 2 turns. Also fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 15%.

Also places a <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buff on this Champion for 2 turns equal to 20% of this Champion’s MAX HP.

The first hit has an 80% chance of removing all buffs from all enemies.

<color=#1ee600>[Passive Effect]</color>

This Champion is immune to <color=#1ee600>[Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Provoke]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Sleep]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color>, and <color=#1ee600>[Petrification]</color> debuffs.

<color=#1ee600>[Active Effect]</color>

At the end of each enemy or ally turn, removes all <color=#1ee600>[Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Provoke]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Sleep]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color>, and <color=#1ee600>[Petrification]</color> debuffs from all allies and places a <color=#1ee600>[Block Debuffs]</color> buff for 1 turn on allies who have debuffs removed.

skill_descriptions.68302: Attacks all enemies. Heals all allies by 20% of this Champion's MAX HP. Heals all allies under <color=#1ee600>[Continuous Heal]</color> buffs by 30% instead.

Also has a 75% chance of removing 1 random debuff from all allies.

Each time a <color=#1ee600>[Continuous Heal]</color> buff heals an ally, fills that ally's Turn Meter by 10%.

If there are multiple Champions in the team with this Skill, only one will activate.

Attacks 1 enemy 2 times.

If this Champion is under a <color=#1ee600>[Veil]</color> or <color=#1ee600>[Perfect Veil]</color> buff, each hit has a 50% chance to decrease the target's Turn Meter by 15%.

Places a 50% <color=#1ee600>[Increase ATK]</color> buff on this Champion for 2 turns if this attack is critical.

If the target is under a <color=#1ee600>[Hex]</color> debuff, each hit will ignore 25% of the target's DEF. Will ignore a further 25% of the target's DEF if they are also under a <color=#1ee600>[Decrease SPD]</color> debuff.

Will also ignore an additional 25% of the target's DEF if they are from the Banner Lords or Knights Revenant Factions.

Each hit also has a 75% chance to steal 25% of the target’s Turn Meter. If the target is from the Banner Lords or Knights Revenant Factions, steals 50% of the Turn Meter instead.

Also places a <color=#1ee600>[Perfect Veil]</color> buff on this Champion for 2 turns.

skill_descriptions.68903: Attacks all enemies. Has an 80% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Block Active Skills]</color> debuff for 2 turns. This debuff cannot be resisted if <color=#F3BC02>Yumeko</color> is on the same team.
skill_descriptions.68904:
Damage inflicted by this Champion cannot be decreased by enemy Passive skills or Masteries, except by the Passive skills of Bosses. 

Damage inflicted by this Champion cannot be increased by either this Champion's Masteries or ally Passive skills, except when attacking Bosses.

Whenever <color=#F3BC02>Yumeko</color> dies, instantly grants a turn to this Champion and resets the cooldowns of each of this Champion’s skills.

Each hit steals 7.5% of the target’s Turn Meter if this Champion has 50% HP or more.

Each hit heals this Champion by 30% of the damage inflicted if this Champion has less than 50% HP.

Attacks 1 enemy. Has an 80% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Hex]</color> debuff for 3 turns. 

<color=#1ee600>[Passive Effect]</color>

Whenever someone fills the Turn Meter of an enemy under a <color=#1ee600>[Hex]</color> debuff placed by this Champion, this Champion's Turn Meter will be filled instead. Only available when <color=#F3BC02>Karato Foxhunter</color> is on the same team.
